```yaml
report_id: M86_1_ARTIFACT_REGISTRY
milestone_id: M86
task_id: M86.1
task_name: Artifact Registry
mode: inventory
```

## Precondition Section

```yaml
precondition_check:
  m86_0_intake_exists: true
  m86_0_final_status: M86_0_READY_FOR_ARTIFACT_REGISTRY_WITH_WARNINGS
  may_prepare_m86_1_artifact_registry: true_with_warnings
  m86_execution_scope: inventory_only
  physical_cleanup_allowed: false
  cleanup_authorized: false
  m87_execution_authorized: false
  m87_started: false
  m88_started: false
  approval_created: false
  lifecycle_mutation_created: false
```

## Artifact Type Taxonomy

```yaml
artifact_type_taxonomy:
  - canonical
  - protected
  - docs
  - report
  - script
  - schema
  - workflow
  - template
  - fixture
  - generated
  - adapter
  - task_lifecycle
  - data
  - config
  - source
  - unknown
```

## Lifecycle Status Taxonomy

```yaml
lifecycle_status_taxonomy:
  - active
  - historical
  - superseded
  - deprecated
  - generated
  - blocked
  - unknown
```

## Authority Level Taxonomy

```yaml
authority_level_taxonomy:
  - canonical
  - protected
  - supporting
  - evidence
  - generated
  - draft
  - unknown
```

## Mandatory Classification Rules

```yaml
mandatory_classification_rules:
  canonical_or_protected:
    protected_or_canonical: true
    physical_action_allowed: false
    cleanup_review_allowed: false
    lifecycle_status: blocked
    cleanup_review_reason: PROTECTED_DO_NOT_TOUCH

  unknown_type_or_authority:
    physical_action_allowed: false
    cleanup_review_allowed: false
    unknown_means_blocked: true

  source_of_truth_true:
    physical_action_allowed: false
    cleanup_review_allowed: false
    cleanup_review_reason: SOURCE_OF_TRUTH_DO_NOT_TOUCH

  report_or_evidence:
    physical_action_allowed: false
    cleanup_review_allowed: true | false | unknown
    human_selection_required: true

  generated_artifact:
    physical_action_allowed: false
    cleanup_review_allowed: true | false | unknown
    human_selection_required: true
```

## Forbidden Registry Claims

Artifact registry is not cleanup authorization.
Artifact registry is not approval.
Artifact registry is not lifecycle mutation.
cleanup_review_allowed does not authorize physical action.
No artifact is safe to delete, archive, move, or compress based on M86.1 alone.
